response.justification: Bogdan's resume shows strong experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but lacks direct relevance to the Senior Manager — Digital Solutions (C++ Developer) role. While he has C/C++ experience (National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI), it is limited and not recent. His expertise lies heavily in web/mobile development (Node.js, TypeScript, React) and scripting (D, Java), with no mention of C++ STL, multi-threading, message brokers, or industrial automation protocols (e.g., Modbus, OPC UA). Security expertise (IEC 62443) and cloud platform solutions are also absent. The role requires deep C++ and industrial system experience, which is not demonstrated here.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with diverse tech stacks
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills with a focus on test-driven development
Proven ability to mentor teams and contribute to architectural design
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience, particularly with STL and industrial automation systems
No evidence of expertise in secure development lifecycle (IEC 62443) or cloud platforms
Lacks required domain knowledge in industrial automation, IoT, or message-broker systems
